scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @min-egenkontroll/app && npm run build --workspace @min-egenkontroll/web
scripts.contracts: node scripts/check-public-contracts.mjs && node --test scripts/contracts/public-platform-contracts.test.mjs && npm run routes:check --workspace @min-egenkontroll/web && npm run links:test --workspace @min-egenkontroll/web && npm run reports:test --workspace @min-egenkontroll/app && npm run invitations:test --workspace @min-egenkontroll/app && npm run environment:test --workspace @min-egenkontroll/app && npm run organization-contexts:test --workspace @min-egenkontroll/app && npm run sharing:test --workspace @min-egenkontroll/app
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @min-egenkontroll/app && npm run typecheck --workspace @min-egenkontroll/web
